name: qbo-receipts-mcp
description: Local stdio MCP server for creating QuickBooks Online expenses with receipt attachments. Multi-currency aware.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/unit.test.js dist/test/integration.test.js
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin master --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes -R mohammadfarooqi/qbo-receipts-mcp
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin master --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes -R mohammadfarooqi/qbo-receipts-mcp
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin master --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes -R mohammadfarooqi/qbo-receipts-mcp

author: Mohammad Farooqi
